# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    protocol: http
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000
    tags: [prod, microservice, users]
    routes:
      - name: users-v1
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        hosts: ["api.example.com"]
        paths: ["/v1/users", "/v1/users/"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 0
        tags: [prod, v1]
      - name: users-v1-id
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        hosts: ["api.example.com"]
        paths: ["~^/v1/users/[^/]+$"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10
        tags: [prod, v1]
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          hide_credentials: true
          key_names: ["x-api-key"]
          run_on_preflight: true
      - name: acl
        enabled: true
        config:
          allow: ["public-api"]
          hide_groups_header: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_timeout: 2000
          limit_by: consumer
          minute: 1200
          hour: 20000
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins: ["https://app.example.com", "https://admin.example.com"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]
          headers: ["Accept", "Accept-Version", "Authorization", "Content-Type", "X-Api-Key", "X-Request-Id", "X-Correlation-Id"]
          exposed_headers: ["X-Request-Id", "X-Correlation-Id"]
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false
      - name: request-transformer
        enabled: true
        config:
          add:
            headers: ["X-Forwarded-Proto:$scheme"]
      - name: correlation-id
        enabled: true
        config:
          header_name: X-Correlation-Id
          generator: uuid
          echo_downstream: true
      - name: prometheus
        enabled: true
        config:
          status_code_metrics: true
          latency_metrics: true
          bandwidth_metrics: true
          upstream_health_metrics: true
      - name: opentelemetry
        enabled: true
        config:
          endpoint: "http://otel-collector:4318/v1/traces"
          resource_attributes:
            service.name: kong-gateway
            deployment.environment: production
          propagation:
            default_format: w3c
            inject: ["tracecontext", "b3"]
            extract: ["tracecontext", "b3"]
          batch_span_processor:
            max_queue_size: 2048
            max_export_batch_size: 512
            scheduled_delay_millis: 5000
            export_timeout_millis: 30000

  - name: orders-service
    protocol: http
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /

    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000

    routes:

        hosts: ["api.example.com"]

          run_on_preflight: true

          hide_groups_header: true

          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_timeout: 2000
          limit_by: consumer
          minute: 600
          hour: 10000
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins: ["https://app.example.com", "https://admin.example.com"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]
          headers: ["Accept", "Accept-Version", "Authorization", "Content-Type", "X-Api-Key", "X-Request-Id", "X-Correlation-Id"]

          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false
      - name: correlation-id
        enabled: true

          generator: uuid

    protocol: http

      - name: inventory-v1-sku
        protocols: [http, https]

        strip_path: false

          redis_timeout: 2000
          limit_by: consumer
          minute: 900
          hour: 15000
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

        enabled: true
        config:
          origins: ["https://app.example.com", "https://admin.example.com"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]

  - name: payments-service
    protocol: http
    host: payments-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 45000
    write_timeout: 45000
    tags: [prod, microservice, payments]
    routes:
      - name: payments-v1
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        hosts: ["api.example.com"]
        paths: ["/v1/payments", "/v1/payments/"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 0
        tags: [prod, v1]
      - name: payments-v1-id
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        hosts: ["api.example.com"]

        strip_path: false

          minute: 300
          hour: 5000

        enabled: true
        config:
          origins: ["https://app.example.com", "https://admin.example.com"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]

  - name: auth-service
    protocol: http
    host: auth-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000
    tags: [prod, microservice, auth]
    routes:
      - name: auth-login
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [POST, OPTIONS]
        hosts: ["api.example.com"]
        paths: ["/v1/auth/login"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 20
        tags: [prod, v1, public]
      - name: auth-refresh
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [POST, OPTIONS]
        hosts: ["api.example.com"]
        paths: ["/v1/auth/refresh"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 20
        tags: [prod, v1, public]
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_timeout: 2000
          limit_by: ip
          minute: 60
          hour: 1000
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins: ["https://app.example.com", "https://admin.example.com"]
          methods: ["POST", "OPTIONS"]
          headers: ["Accept", "Accept-Version", "Authorization", "Content-Type", "X-Request-Id", "X-Correlation-Id"]
          exposed_headers: ["X-Request-Id", "X-Correlation-Id"]
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false
      - name: correlation-id
        enabled: true
        config:
          header_name: X-Correlation-Id
          generator: uuid
          echo_downstream: true

routes:
  - name: healthz
    protocols: [http, https]
    methods: [GET]
    hosts: ["api.example.com"]
    paths: ["/healthz"]
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    https_redirect_status_code: 426
    plugins:
      - name: request-termination
        enabled: true
        config:
          status_code: 200
          content_type: "application/json"
          body: "{\"status\":\"ok\"}"

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
          http_statuses: [200, 204]
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
    targets:
      - target: users-svc.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-svc-canary.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 0

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
          http_statuses: [200, 204]
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
    targets:
      - target: orders-svc.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      active:
        type: http

    targets:
      - target: inventory-svc.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: payments-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000

  - name: auth-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      active:
        type: http

        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
    targets:
      - target: auth-svc.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

consumers:
  - username: public-api-client
    custom_id: public-api-client
    tags: [prod, consumer]
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "REPLACE_WITH_SECURE_RANDOM_KEY"
    acls:
      - group: public-api

plugins:
  - name: bot-detection
    enabled: true
    config:
      deny:
        - "curl"
        - "python-requests"
  - name: request-size-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      allowed_payload_size: 10
      size_unit: megabytes
  - name: http-log
    enabled: true
    config:
      http_endpoint: "http://log-collector:8080/kong"
      method: POST
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      queue:
        max_batch_size: 50
        max_coalescing_delay: 1
        max_entries: 10000
  - name: response-transformer
    enabled: true
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Gateway: kong"
  - name: pre-function
    enabled: true
    config:
      access:
        - |
          local rid = kong.request.get_header("X-Request-Id")
          if not rid or rid == "" then
            kong.service.request.set_header("X-Request-Id", kong.request.get_header("X-Correlation-Id") or kong.request.get_id())
          end
